title: November 27
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|November|hide31=yes}}

'''November 27''' is the 331st day (332nd in leap years) of the year. There are 34 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1957|1957]] – [[Michael A. Stackpole]] is born.
*[[1974]] – [[Alec Newman]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Jaleel White]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 32|''Star Wars'' (1977) 32]] published.
*[[2001]] – ''[[Darth Maul: Shadow Hunter]]'' paperback published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... Volume 3: Resurrection of Evil]]'' published.
*2002 – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 48]]'' published.
*[[2007]] – ''[[Legacy of the Force: Fury]]'' published.
*2007 – [[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] published.
*[[2010]] – [[Irvin Kershner]] dies.
*[[2013]] – [[Legacy (2013) 9|''Legacy'' (2013) 9]] published.
*[[2018]] – ''[[YT-1300 Millennium Falcon Owners' Workshop Manual]]'' published.
*2018 – ''[[The Star Wars Archives: Episodes IV–VI, 1977–1983]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 39|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 39]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 28|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 28]] published.
*[[2020]] – "[[Chapter 13: The Jedi]]" premiered on [[Disney+]].
*2020 – "[[Lightsabers and Jedi Equipment]]" published in [[Wikipedia:France|France]].
*[[2024]] – [[Battle of Jakku — Republic Under Siege 2|''Battle of Jakku — Republic Under Siege'' 2]] published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic Adventures – Dispatches from the Occlusion Zone 2|''The High Republic Adventures – Dispatches from the Occlusion Zone'' 2]] published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic Adventures – Echoes of Fear 3|''The High Republic Adventures – Echoes of Fear'' 3]] published.
